title: jasminum honghoense
intro: Jasminum honghoense, also known as Hong Kong jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jasminum honghoense include reducing fever, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
